heading: Presumptions of service connection for veterans who served offshore of the Republic of Vietnam
label: 1116A Presumptions of service connection for veterans who served offshore of the Republic of Vietnam
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–23, § 2(g)133 Stat. 969June 25, 2019“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall take effect on .”section 1710 of this titleJanuary 1, 2020

Implementation, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–23, § 2(c)133 Stat. 968June 25, 2019“(1).—GuidanceNotwithstanding section 501 of such title, the Secretary of Veterans Affairs may issue guidance to implement , United States Code, as added by subsection (a), before prescribing new regulations under such section.section 1116A of title 38“(2).—Updates(A)Not later than 120 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [], the Secretary shall submit a report to the Committees on Veterans’ Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Senate regarding the plans of the Secretary—June 25, 2019“(i)to conduct outreach under subsection (d); and“(ii)to respond to inquiries from veterans regarding claims for disability compensation under , United States Code, as added by subsection (a) of this section.section 1116A of title 38“(B)On a quarterly basis during the period beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act and ending on the date on which regulations are prescribed to carry out such section 1116A, the Secretary shall submit to the Committees on Veterans’ Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Senate updates on the status of such regulations.“(3)Pending cases.—“(A).—Authority to stayThe Secretary may stay a claim described in subparagraph (B) until the date on which the Secretary commences the implementation of such section 1116A.“(B).—Claims describedA claim described in this subparagraph is a claim for disability compensation—“(i)relating to the service and diseases covered by such section 1116A; and“(ii)that is pending at the Veterans Benefits Administration or the Board of Veterans’ Appeals on or after the date of the enactment of this Act and before the date on which the Secretary commences the implementation of such section 1116A.”

Outreach, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–23, § 2(d)133 Stat. 968June 25, 2019“(1).—RequirementThe Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall conduct outreach to inform veterans described in paragraph (2) of the ability to submit a claim for disability compensation under , United States Code, as added by subsection (a). Such outreach shall include the following:section 1116A of title 38“(A)The Secretary shall publish on the website of the Department a notice that a veterans [sic] described in paragraph (2) may submit or resubmit a claim for disability compensation under such section 1116A.“(B)The Secretary shall notify in writing the veteran service organization community of the ability of veterans described in paragraph (2) to submit or resubmit claims for disability compensation under such section 1116A.“(2).—Veteran describedA veteran described in this paragraph is a veteran who, during active military, naval, or air service, served offshore of the Republic of Vietnam during the period beginning on , and ending on .”January 9, 1962May 7, 1975

children.heading: .—Service Connection
children.label: a .—Service Connection
children.text: For the purposes of , and subject to , a disease covered by becoming manifest as specified in that section in a veteran who, during active military, naval, or air service, served offshore of the Republic of Vietnam during the period beginning on , and ending on , shall be considered to have been incurred in or aggravated by such service, notwithstanding that there is no record of evidence of such disease during the period of such service.section 1110 of this titlesection 1113 of this titlesection 1116 of this titleJanuary 9, 1962May 7, 1975

children.heading: .—Exposure
children.label: b .—Exposure
children.text: A veteran who, during active military, naval, or air service, served offshore of the Republic of Vietnam during the period beginning on , and ending on , shall be presumed to have been exposed during such service to an herbicide agent unless there is affirmative evidence to establish that the veteran was not exposed to any such agent during that service.January 9, 1962May 7, 1975
Except as provided by paragraph (2), the effective date of an award under this section shall be determined in accordance with .section 5110 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (g) of , the Secretary shall determine the effective date of an award based on a claim under this section for an individual described in subparagraph (B) by treating the date on which the individual filed the prior claim specified in clause (i) of such subparagraph as the date on which the individual filed the claim so awarded under this section.section 5110 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: The veteran or survivor submitted a claim for disability compensation on or after , and before , for a disease covered by this section, and the claim was denied by reason of the claim not establishing that the disease was incurred or aggravated by the service of the veteran.September 25, 1985January 1, 2020

children.label: ii
children.text: The veteran or survivor submits a claim for disability compensation on or after , for the same condition covered by the prior claim under clause (i), and the claim is approved pursuant to this section.January 1, 2020

children.heading: .—Determination of Offshore
children.label: d .—Determination of Offshore
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, for purposes of this section, the Secretary shall treat a location as being offshore of Vietnam if the location is not more than 12 nautical miles seaward of a line commencing on the southwestern demarcation line of the waters of Vietnam and Cambodia and intersecting the following points:Points Geographic NamesLatitudeNorthLongitudeEastAt Hon Nhan Island, Tho Chu Archipelago Kien Giang Province9°15.0′103°27.0′At Hon Da Island southeast of Hon Khoai Island Minh Hai Province8°22.8′104°52.4′At Tai Lon Islet, Con Dao Islet in Con Dao-Vung Toa Special Sector8°37.8′106°37.5′At Bong Lai Islet, Con Dao Islet8°38.9′106°40.3′At Bay Canh Islet, Con Dao Islet8°39.7′106°42.1′At Hon Hai Islet (Phu Qui group of islands) Thuan Hai Province9°58.0′109°5.0′At Hon Doi Islet, Thuan Hai Province12°39.0′109°28.0′At Dai Lanh point, Phu Khanh Province12°53.8′109°27.2′At Ong Can Islet, Phu Khanh Province13°54.0′109°21.0′At Ly Son Islet, Nghia Binh Province15°23.1′109° 9.0′At Con Co Island, Binh Tri Thien Province17°10.0′107°20.6′

children.heading: .—Herbicide Agent
children.label: e .—Herbicide Agent
children.text: In this section, the term “herbicide agent” has the meaning given that term in .section 1116(a)(3) of this title
